# Tokcat

> Tokcat is an AI token usage monitor for the macOS menu bar: a Claude Code usage tracker, Codex usage tracker, Cursor usage dashboard, and LLM cost tracker for AI coding agent usage across Claude Code, Codex CLI, Cursor IDE, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, Copilot CLI, Amp, Droid, and Hermes. It visualizes token usage as a recent 30-day 2D stacked token chart and a full-year 3D GitHub-style contribution graph. Built with Tauri 2 (Rust + React/Vite), distributed via Homebrew and GitHub Releases. Apple Silicon and Intel Macs, macOS 11+. MIT licensed.

## Install

- [Homebrew](https://github.com/handlecusion/tokcat#quick-start): `brew install --cask handlecusion/tokcat/tokcat`
- [DMG download](https://github.com/handlecusion/tokcat/releases/latest)
- [Homebrew tap repository](https://github.com/handlecusion/homebrew-tokcat)

## Documentation

- [README (English)](https://github.com/handlecusion/tokcat/blob/main/README.md)
- [README (Korean)](https://github.com/handlecusion/tokcat/blob/main/README.ko-KR.md)
- [Landing page](https://handlecusion.github.io/tokcat/)
- [Releases](https://github.com/handlecusion/tokcat/releases)

## Architecture

- [Tauri shell source](https://github.com/handlecusion/tokcat/tree/main/src-tauri): Rust backend, native tray, animation frames
- [Frontend source](https://github.com/handlecusion/tokcat/tree/main/src): React + Vite, react-three-fiber 3D graph
- [tokscale upstream](https://github.com/junhoyeo/tokscale): reference project for supported local log formats

## Supported AI clients

Claude Code, OpenAI Codex CLI, Cursor IDE, OpenCode, Google Gemini CLI, GitHub Copilot CLI, Amp, Droid, and Hermes.

## Privacy

No telemetry. No cloud sync. No Tokcat account. Network access is limited to the GitHub Releases updater manifest checked every 30 minutes and direct Codex/Claude OAuth quota lookups when local credentials are available. Token-usage history is read locally from session logs.
